text: Hi, I ordered a floral centerpiece arrangement last week. Can you tell me when it will be shipped?
Hi Julia! Your order is scheduled to ship tomorrow via FedEx. You'll receive a tracking number by email once it's picked up.
Perfect, thank you! Just wanted to make sure it arrives before Saturday's event.
Hi, I'd like to return the centerpieces I ordered for last Saturday's event. They arrived damaged and we had to use alternatives.
Hi Sophie, so sorry to hear that! Please send us photos of the damage and we'll arrange a full refund or replacement right away.
Thanks, I'll send the photos now. Hoping for a refund rather than replacement as the event has already passed.
Hi, just wanted to confirm my appointment for the corporate event planning session this Friday at 2pm?
Hi Ethan! Yes, your appointment is confirmed for Friday, December 19th at 2:00 PM. We look forward to seeing you at Campbell Events!
Perfect, thank you! See you then.
Hi! What are your business hours? I'm looking to book an event soon.
Hi Linda! We're open Mon–Fri 9am–6pm and Sat 10am–4pm. Feel free to stop by or call us anytime!
Perfect, thank you! I'll come by Saturday morning.
Hi, I wanted to ask if you still have availability for a corporate dinner event on January 19th for around 80 guests?
Hello Marco! Yes, January 19th is available. We can accommodate up to 120 guests for corporate dinners. Shall I send you our packages?
That would be great, please send them over. We'd also need AV equipment included if possible.
Hi, I made a payment yesterday for the Henderson wedding package but haven't received a receipt yet. Could you please send one?
Hi Tessa! Thanks for reaching out. I can confirm we received your payment. I'll email your receipt to the address on file within the next 30 minutes.
Perfect, thank you! Just wanted to make sure everything was in order before our planning meeting tomorrow.
Hi Julia! Your order is scheduled to ship tomorrow via FedEx. You'll receive a tracking number by email once it's picked up.
That would be great, please send them over. We'd also need AV equipment included if possible.
